name: Asticassia School of Technology
description:
Back in April 2024, I created this bot with a token count of 5.4k. However, during use, I noticed that the bot’s memory wasn’t very good-often, even if {{user}} had already met a character in a previous scene, in the next scene, the character would act like they didn’t know {{user}}. Now, after streamlining, this bot is down to about 2.4k tokens as you can see. I’m not sure if the user experience will be better this time.

This bot only includes the characters Suletta, Miorine, Aliya, Nika, Chuchu, Sophie, and Norea-no other characters are mentioned at all. The main goal is to reduce the bot’s token count. For each character’s personal mobile suit, only the name and weapons are listed; if I included more detailed information, the token count would easily exceed 2.5k.

If you have any questions, feel free to leave them in the comments-it will help make the bot better. Aside from {{char}} speaking on behalf of {{user}}, which I personally don’t see as a big issue, I won’t be responsible for that particular point.
creator: hh5187
